overall.description: A static nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline viewed from across a body of water. The scene features illuminated high-rise buildings, a prominent 'softsys' corporate sign, and reflective water surface with a moody, atmospheric fog characteristic of high-end game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade facing cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the illuminated city skyline from across the water

entered.detail: low-rise waterfront building with illuminated green 'softsys' signage
cluster of futuristic high-rise towers with various colored lights and glowing windows
dark water with white reflective ripples and wave patterns
dark hazy sky with atmospheric fog and ambient city glow

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a cyberpunk city at night, viewed from across a waterfront. The 'softsys' building sits on the right while illuminated skyscrapers rise in the distance. The water surface shows gentle animated ripples reflecting the city lights, with no visible movement or activity in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric panoramic view of a cyberpunk city skyline at night as seen from across a dark waterfront. It begins with a wide gaze across the water, where gentle ripples continuously reflect the vibrant glow of the distant urban sprawl. The focus remains steady on the illuminated skyscrapers that pierce the horizon, with the prominent softsys corporate building anchoring the right side of the frame. The scene persists in this moody stillness, maintaining a consistent composition of neon lights and deep shadows mirrored on the water's surface.
